rootCauseHypothesis:
RESULT: Partial success (contact links missing)

Checklist of assertions from the user request (each entry: Present: Yes/No — captured excerpt / links):

- Hero — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "Building the future with code & AI"
  - First lines: "I'm Rashid — a Full-Stack Developer and AI Engineer. I build AI-powered platforms, 3D games, and open-source tools that push the boundaries of what the web can do."
  - Evidence: page content captured during the session (hero excerpt and nav 'Rashid').

- About — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "About Me"
  - First lines: "Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer — building the future one project at a time..."
  - Evidence: extracted page text included biography/Main paragraph.

- Projects — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "Projects"
  - First lines: "Games, apps, AI models, and tools I've built..."
  - Visible filters: All, Games, Apps, AI Models, Tools
  - Example project links observed: https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/games/farm-game/index.html, https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/apps/quran-app/index.html, https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/models/Rashid-Model/index.html

- Skills — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "Skills"
  - First lines: "Technologies I use daily to build production-ready systems."
  - Skill card headings: Frontend; Backend; Databases; DevOps; AI & ML; Tools

- Timeline — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "Timeline"
  - Entries verified for years: 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 with respective short descriptions (e.g., 2025: "Rashid AI v3.0 & 3D Game Engine...", 2022: "GitHub Launch & Open Source...").

- Open Source — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "Open Source"
  - First lines: "Real-time GitHub dashboard — stats, repos, and activity."
  - Visible dashboard state: "Unable to load GitHub data. Visit my GitHub →"
  - Link: https://github.com/MOT1209

- Vault — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "The Vault"
  - First lines: "Knowledge repository — prompts, code, media, docs, and archives."
  - Categories/icons visible: Prompts; Code; Media; Docs; Archives

- Contact — present: Partially
  Captured excerpt:
  - Heading: "Get in Touch"
  - First lines: "Let's build something great together. Reach out anytime."
  - Contact form fields present: Name; Email; Message; button text: "Send Message"
  - Contact links observed: GitHub link present (https://github.com/MOT1209)
  - Missing/failed items: No explicit YouTube or TikTok contact links were found on the page; Email appears as a form field label rather than an explicit mailto: link. Therefore the assertion that the Contact section shows Email, GitHub, YouTube, and TikTok contact links is NOT fully satisfied.

- Navigation Bar — present: Yes
  Captured excerpt:
  - Visible nav links: Home, About, Projects, Skills, Timeline, Open Source, Vault, Blog, Downloads, Contact

Summary and outcome:
- The homepage renders all requested sections (Hero, About, Projects, Skills, Timeline, Open Source, Vault, Contact, Navigation). Content and headings were observed and captured for each section.
- Failure condition: The Contact-links requirement (explicit Email link plus YouTube and TikTok links) was NOT met — YouTube and TikTok links were not present, and Email is shown as a form field label rather than an explicit mailto link.

Conclusion: Task marked done with partial success (success=false) because one explicit assertion in the user's list is not satisfied (missing YouTube/TikTok links and no explicit email link). All other assertions are satisfied and evidence is present in the session's page captures and extracted text. Links observed: site homepage https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/, GitHub: https://github.com/MOT1209, example project links listed above.
